passes.title: American Heritage Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Admission with this pass is half price for up to four (4) people. 
This pass will be emailed to you when you reserve it.
source_phrases: Admission with this pass is half price for up to four (4) people.
This pass will be emailed to you when you reserve it.

passes.title: Boston Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass grants 50% off for up to 4 people using ferry transportation to the Boston Harbor Islands (Georges, Peddocks, or Spectacle Island).
Discount code will be emailed when library pass is reserved.  Currently there is no coupon to pick up for Boston Harbor Islands.  You must reserve your library pass and then purchase your ferry tickets online using the code sent to you.
Visit http://www.bostonharborislands.org/ to learn about the Islands, view park maps and activity calendars, and access the ferry schedule.
source_phrases: This pass grants 50% off for up to 4 people using ferry transportation to the Boston Harbor Islands (Georges, Peddocks, or Spectacle Island).

Discount code will be emailed when library pass is reserved.  Currently there is no coupon to pick up for Boston Harbor Islands.  You must reserve your library pass and then purchase your ferry tickets online using the code sent to you.
Visit http://www.bostonharborislands.org/ to learn about the Islands, view park maps and activity calendars, and access the ferry schedule.

passes.title: Boston Harbor Island Ferry
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits 1 visitor free of charge.  Only 1 coupon per group allowed.
For ticket pricing and hours, please refer to The Butterfly Place website.  https://butterflyplace-ma.com/schedule/
This coupon pass can be picked up one week in advance. The physical coupon must be brought to the Butterfly Place to receive the discount admission; the confirmation email is NOT the coupon/pass. You must visit the library with your library card or ID to pick up the reserved pass before visiting the Butterfly Place.

passes.title: The Butterfly Place
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to four people at $5.00 off each. Children under five and active military are free.
For museum hours, exhibits, and directions please visit the Concord Museum's website: https://concordmuseum.org/
This pass can be picked up the day before (if available) or day of reservation. This pass must be returned to the library by opening on the day after use.

passes.title: Concord Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits 3 visitors at 1/2 price admission per person; any additional visitors must pay the regular admission price.
This pass is not an admissions ticket, you must bring the pass to the museum to receive the discounted admission.
This pass will be emailed to you when you place the reservation.

passes.title: The Discovery Museums
source_phrases: This pass provides 50% Discount Admission for up to 2 adults and 2 children in one vehicle. Children under 2 are free.
Pass does not cover the cost for tickets to the Alden Digital Planetarium, the Explorer Express Train, or special ticketed events.
This coupon may be picked up one week in advance of your visit date.

passes.title: Harvard Museums Of Science And Culture
Isabella Stewart Gardner Museum
passes.benefit_text:
THERE IS NO PASS TO RESERVE FOR THE JFK LIBRARY & MUSEUM
Starting July 10, 2024 ALL MASSACHUSETTS LIBRARY CARD HOLDERS CAN RECEIVE A 50% DISCOUNT BY SHOWING THEIR MA LIBRARY CARD
Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket.
This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission.
Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600
source_phrases: THERE IS NO PASS TO RESERVE FOR THE JFK LIBRARY & MUSEUM
Starting July 10, 2024 ALL MASSACHUSETTS LIBRARY CARD HOLDERS CAN RECEIVE A 50% DISCOUNT BY SHOWING THEIR MA LIBRARY CARD
Present your physical or digital Massachusetts library card at the Admissions Desk to receive a 50% discount on the cardholder's admission ticket.

This offer is valid for visitors aged 13 and over and the visitor must present a Massachusetts library card to receive the discount. No pass is needed. Visitors aged 12 and under receive free admission.
Please reach out to the JFK Library Visitor Services Department with questions at kennedy.groupvisits@nara.gov or 617-514-1600

passes.title: John F Kennedy Library And Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admits up to 4 persons with a co-payment of $2.00 per person (adults, seniors, or children age two or older). Children under two are always admitted free.
This pass is valid at all Mass Audubon Society Sanctuaries, including Drumlin Farm in Lincoln. Each location has its own operating schedule. Please check the Mass Audubon website before planning your visit.
For nature centers that use timed ticketing, the library pass is NOT your ticket.
This pass can be printed from home. You must bring the pass to the reservation to receive the discount.
source_phrases: Pass admits up to 4 persons with a co-payment of $2.00 per person (adults, seniors, or children age two or older). Children under two are always admitted free.

This pass is valid at all Mass Audubon Society Sanctuaries, including Drumlin Farm in Lincoln. Each location has its own operating schedule. Please check the Mass Audubon website before planning your visit.
For nature centers that use timed ticketing, the library pass is NOT your ticket.
This pass can be printed from home. You must bring the pass to the reservation to receive the discount.

passes.title: Mass Audubon Drumlin Farm
passes.benefit_text:
The Parks Pass allows free parking to all Massachusetts State Parks that charge a parking fee. The Parks Pass is not valid for camping or at the following locations - Quabbin Reservoir, Squantum Point, North Point or Draw Seven Commuter lots. Some Massachusetts state parks do not charge a parking fee.
Please check website for updated information regarding hours and closings of the many Massachusetts State Parks prior to using Pass. https://www.mass.gov/info-details/find-a-park
This pass can be picked up the day before (if available) or day of reservation.
This pass must be returned to the library by opening on the day after use.
source_phrases: The Parks Pass allows free parking to all Massachusetts State Parks that charge a parking fee. The Parks Pass is not valid for camping or at the following locations - Quabbin Reservoir, Squantum Point, North Point or Draw Seven Commuter lots. Some Massachusetts state parks do not charge a parking fee.
Please check website for updated information regarding hours and closings of the many Massachusetts State Parks prior to using Pass. https://www.mass.gov/info-details/find-a-park
This pass can be picked up the day before (if available) or day of reservation.
This pass must be returned to the library by opening on the day after use.

passes.title: Massachusetts State Parks Department Of Conservation And Recreation
passes.benefit_text:
Each pass allows admission for up to 2 adults at 50% off and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. Children 6 and under are always admitted free.
The Museum of Fine Arts strongly encourages you to reserve your tickets online in advance—check mfa.org for the most up-to-date availability. Special ticketed exhibitions still require a timed-entry ticket.
To reserve discounted tickets online, visit Tickets , select the date and type of ticket, and enter the promo code on the top right corner of the next page, which will activate the reduced admission rate. You will need to create a free user account at mfa.org if you do not already have one.
This is not a physical pass. Reserve the pass, and you will receive an email with a unique promo code within 48 hours.
This pass is sponsored in part by a generous donation from Dinah Voorhies
source_phrases: Each pass allows admission for up to 2 adults at 50% off and up to 4 children ages 7–17 at $10 each (special exhibition only). There is no discount for children 7–17 for general admission, currently $10. Children 6 and under are always admitted free.

The Museum of Fine Arts strongly encourages you to reserve your tickets online in advance—check mfa.org for the most up-to-date availability. Special ticketed exhibitions still require a timed-entry ticket.

To reserve discounted tickets online, visit Tickets , select the date and type of ticket, and enter the promo code on the top right corner of the next page, which will activate the reduced admission rate. You will need to create a free user account at mfa.org if you do not already have one.
This is not a physical pass. Reserve the pass, and you will receive an email with a unique promo code within 48 hours.
This pass is sponsored in part by a generous donation from Dinah Voorhies

passes.title: Museum Of Fine Arts
passes.benefit_text:
* This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
*Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
*Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.
* When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
*If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
This pass will be emailed to you when you place your reservation.
source_phrases: * This pass will admit up to 4 people at a 50% discount on tickets to the Museum’s Exhibit Halls. Children under 3 are not included in the count of 4 and are always admitted for free.
*Your Library pass can only be used on the date printed on the pass.
*Please bring your library pass confirmation (printed or displayed on a phone) when you visit.

* When you arrive at the Museum, stop at the Box Office to exchange your library pass and purchase your Exhibit Halls tickets at the discounted rate. If you have any questions or would like to reserve your Exhibit Halls passes in advance to avoid waiting in line the day of your visit, please call 617-723-2500 (9:00 a.m. – 5:00 p.m. daily).
*If you are unable to show your Library confirmation on a phone, you may print out a copy using the link in the confirmation email or request a paper copy from the library.
This pass will be emailed to you when you place your reservation.

passes.title: New England Aquarium
passes.benefit_text:
This pass provides half-priced admission for 2 people.
The physical membership card must be brought to the Garden to receive the discount even if online tickets have been purchased before your visit .
The membership card must be returned to the library after your visit.

passes.benefit_text: The pass allows admission for up to five (5) people at 50% off.

passes.title: North Shore Childrens Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits two people at a discounted price.  Timed tickets to Yin Yu Tang: A Chinese Home are included with museum admission.
You must first reserve your library pass to receive your promotional code to purchase PEM tickets.
The pass will be emailed to you when you place your reservation .

passes.title: Peabody Essex Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass allows a discounted admission rate for up to six visitors.
Discounted rates are $13.50 per adult/senior and $11.25 per child. (Regular rates are $17.50 for adults, $16.00 for seniors, and $14.50 for children). Library passes are not accepted in the month of October.
Tickets for the Museum are available online ONLY and are sold ONLY for same day. Please check the museum site at https://salemwitchmuseum.com/ for current hours and ticket availability. To receive the discounted rate, enter the coupon code from the pass (also included in the pass use instructions when you  reserve the pass).
This pass can be picked up the day before (if available) or day of reservation. This pass must be returned to the library by opening on the day after use.
The physical pass MUST be shown at the museum or visitors will be charged full price at the door.
source_phrases: Pass allows a discounted admission rate for up to six visitors.

passes.title: Salem Witch Museum
passes.benefit_text:
Pass admission is equivalent to the admission benefit of a Trustees Family Level Membership for two adults and children under 18.
Pass is valid at any Trustees property that charges admission, including (but not limited to): deCordova Sculpture Park , Fruitlands , the Old Manse , and Castle Hill on the Crane Estate .
Please check the Trustees' website for information on properties, admission rates, parking, and other regulations: https://thetrustees.org/
The Trustees passes are valid for admission only ; not valid for discounts at parking kiosks, stores, cafes, inns, campgrounds, special events and programs, equipment rental, or in place of any other permits or passes. 
This pass can be picked up one week in advance.

One pass allows free admission for up to 5 people. One pass per party.
See the museum's website for hours and details https://ussconstitutionmuseum.org .
This digital pass can be printed, or shown to museum staff on the patron's phone.

passes.title: The Uss Constitution Museum
passes.benefit_text:
This pass admits 6 people at $9.00 per Adult and $6.00 per Child to the Franklin Park or Stone Zoo. Children under 2 are free .
Visit https://www.zoonewengland.org/ for hours and ticket status for Zoo New England. You must bring the library pass for discounted admission.
Pass does not cover admission to the Zoo's Holiday Lights.
This pass can be picked up one week in advance.
